name: claude-obsidian
description: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault (Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern). v1.7 "Compound Vault" adds: substrate dependency on kepano/obsidian-skills, default Obsidian CLI transport with fallback chain, hybrid retrieval (contextual prefix + BM25 + cosine rerank) per Anthropic's Sept 2024 research, and per-file advisory locking for safe multi-writer ingest. Optional DragonScale Memory extension (log folds, deterministic addresses, semantic tiling lint, boundary-first autoresearch).
